element.hint: Allows user to import an organization hierarchy (tree).
element.label: Global Hierarchy Importer
element.name: can_import_ou_hierarchy

element.hint: Allows the user to create/update/delete Personal, OU, and Global templates.
element.label: Global Template Designer
element.name: can_manage_global_processes

element.hint: Allows user to add/update members for the selected Organizational Unit.
element.label: OU Member Administrator
element.name: can_manage_ou_members

element.label: User can manage OU notification profile
element.name: can_manage_ou_notification_profile

element.label: User can create a personal profile
element.name: can_manage_personal_notification_profile

element.hint: Manage template permissions for Personal, OU, and Global template designers.
element.label: Template Designer Permissions Administrator
element.name: can_manage_process_permissions

element.hint: Allows the user to create/update/delete Personal & OU templates.
element.label: OU Template Designer
element.name: has_ou_process_rights

element.hint: Allows the user to create/update/delete Personal templates.
element.label: Personal Template Designer
element.name: has_personal_process_rights

element.hint: Manage Task assignment in all OUs | Provide Tasking Manager role for an OU | Reviews and approves Suggested Tasks | Inherits Global Template Designer role.
element.label: Task Administrator
element.name: is_global_tasking_authority

element.hint: Allows user to add/update Sub Organizational Units, and manage Members in the selected Organizational Unit.
element.label: OU Hierarchy Administrator
element.name: is_office_administrator

element.hint: Provides access to all the Tasker Application features, functions, permissions and data (ex. Category/SubCategory). Sets permissions for task, member, process, and organizational hierarchy Administrators.
element.label: Tasker Application Administrator
element.name: is_tasker_application_admin

element.hint: Limit notifications to your tasks | Task assignment in all OUs | Create/Run/Edit Global Templates
element.label: Task Executive
element.name: is_task_executive

element.hint: Manage Task assignment for the selected Organizational Unit | Inherits OU Template Designer role.
element.label: Task Manager
element.name: office_task_authority

element.hint: Allows the user to add/update Sub Organizational Units in all OUs, and manage their Members.
element.label: Global Hierarchy Administrator
element.name: user_is_organization_admin

element.label: Set Member OU as the new Default Member OU?
element.name: u_isdefaultou
